name: lyra-security-supply-chain
description: Supply-chain security by mechanism: enforced lockfiles, contained install scripts, release-age cooldown against worm-speed attacks, digest/SHA pinning, SBOM inventory, keyless signing with deploy-time verification, provenance attestations, hardened CI, registry hygiene, and a rehearsed compromise drill. Integrates with lyra-ci-cd-automation, lyra-podman-images, lyra-security-secrets.
